Militarism
Fascism

text: Convince the remaining population to join one of your cities
Trade with the lost tribe for [Gold]
Study their tools to discover a new technology
uniques: [1] free random researchable Tech(s) from the [Ancient era]

text: Study their maps of nearby territory
uniques: Reveal up to [All] [All] within a [5] tile radius

text: Study the lost tribe's religion

name: Comet Sighted
text: People are often superstitious and the appearance of a comet has convinced many that the end of times is soon to come. Whether or not this is actually the case, this is bound to cause some instability within the nation.

choices.text: It is an omen!
The end is nigh!
Keep looking at the sky!

name: Comet Spotted
text: A comet was sighted in the sky. Some people in the past believed that this portents fell times ahead. Others used to believe that they are in fact pixie fairies floating in the sky. Such primitive ways of thinking, it's almost embarassing that our ancestors used to believe in such nonsensical rubbish like that.

choices.text: Thank God we live in such enlightened times.

name: Artists Protest the Eiffel Tower
text: 'We, writers, painters, sculptors, architects and passionate devotees of the hitherto untouched beauty of this nation, protest with all our strength, against the erection of this useless and monstrous Eiffel Tower. To bring our arguments home, imagine for a moment a giddy, ridiculous tower dominating this city like a gigantic black smokestack, crushing under its barbaric bulk all of our humiliated monuments which will disappear in this ghastly dream.'

choices.text: Idiots
We can't take it down! We're using it as a radio tower!
uniques: Gain a free [Broadcast Tower] [in this city]

choices.text: Fine, let's tear it down.
uniques: [+1 Happiness] per [2] social policies adopted <for [999999] turns> <hidden from users>
[+5 Happiness, +1 Culture] [in capital] <for [999999] turns> <hidden from users>

name: A Destitute Noble
text: A destitute nobleman has arrived at your court. He is without Lord and pledges his service your name. The nobleman is ragged and unkempt, but adorned with many scars, and has evidently fielded many battles. It is up to you what is to be done with him.

choices.text: Turn him away! We don't need him stinking up the Court!
Have him cleaned up and suited with armor.
Confiscate what little estate he possesses and then have him executed!

name: The Guest Star
text: The year is 1054, a star has appeared in the heavens. It glows with a breathtaking brilliance, captivating the entirety of the nation. The event is surely one of great significance.

choices.text: Such beauty!
A astronomical miracle!

name: Solar Eclipse
text: The nation stares in awe as the Sun slowly disappears behind the black disc suspended in the sky, and the world turns to darkness despite it being mid-day. Your subjects are absolutely terrified.

choices.text: Our prayers and sacrifices shall bring back the light.
There must be a reasonable explanation.

name: Warbands
text: A warband, seeking refuge from some foreign war, has arrived at your Palace, and offer their services to you. These are no mere barbarians; these are diciplined soldiers. If not us, then they might turn to our enemies.

choices.text: We shall have no foreigners in our armies!
We must turn them away!
Pay them well, and bring them into our service!

name: Mercenaries
text: A band of mercenaries, fresh from some foreign war now settled, has arrived at your Palace, and offer their services to you. These are no mere vagabonds; these are professional soldiers. If not us, then they might turn to our enemies.

choices.text: We shall have no foreigners in our armies!
We must turn them away!
Pay them well, and bring them into our service!

name: Outlaws
text: A posse of outlaws, fresh from some foreign war now settled, has arrived at your Palace, and offer their services to you. These are no mere burgalars; these are trained raiders. If not us, then they might turn to our enemies.

choices.text: We shall have no foreigners in our armies!
We must turn them away!
Pay them well, and bring them into our service!

name: PMCs
text: An organization of PMCs, fresh from some foreign war now settled, has sent a message to the military, and offer their services to you. These are no mere insurgents; these are true veterans. If not us, then they might turn to our enemies.

choices.text: We shall have no guns-for-hire in our armies!
We must turn them away!
Pay them well, and bring them into our service!

name: Struck Oil!
text: Glorious news! Our workers have found a new, rich source of oil on a nearby our existing oil wells! The oil is sitting there, just waiting for us to drill it out.

choices.text: Wonderful news!

name: A Beast Stalks the City
text: Rumors have begun to filter into the Palace that a monstrous beast stalks the city streets at the dead of night. Eye-witnesses claim that the beast is a demon, others claim it is the elusive wild haggis. Regardless, it is beginning to disquiet the city, and so the matter must be dealt with.

choices.text: I do not address mere rumors.
Send out some guards and bring back the pelt of this beast.
Capture it, put it in a zoo, and charge extra to have it seen.
I shall hunt this beast myself!

name: Miracle Harvest!
text: Owing to discovering fertilisers, our farmers accross the nation report an amazing surplus of food. Rarely has the earth ever yielded so much!

choices.text: Food for all!

name: Social Reforms
text: Your advisors have proposed a number of policies that would likely profit our nation greatly if taken into effect. They are extremely radical, however, and it is possible that many will not take well to the changes.

choices.text: No! These drastic reforms will harm the nation, not help it!
These reforms shall be of great use, implement them at once!
Whoever thinks this is a good idea are traitors to the state! Have them executed!

name: Nationalize the Utilities
text: Should we nationalize those industries which are essential for our people's welfare? The industries' owners won't like it, but the nation will be better off for it in the long run.

choices.text: These industries shall stay private!
For the People!

name: Subsidize
text: Problems with traffic congestion hinder productivity in our nation. If we were to promote public transport, we should be able to ensure that both people and resources can get to where they need to be on time.

choices.text: Expand bus and tram routes.
Fund an underground subway.

name: Mystic
text: An itinerant mystic had made some spiced cider from the fruit trees he has planted during his annual pilgrimage. Crowds are already gathering, sharing food and listening to the mystic's sermons.

choices.text: Listen to his sermons, they are quite thought-provoking.
Take up the product, and share it with the world!
Tell the mystic to be quiet! I deal with enough crazy people already!

name: Harvest
text: This years harvest was more bountiful than normal, with granaries, flour mills and bakeries full to the brim with food for the people!

choices.text: A glorious harvest for a glorious year!

name: Famine
text: This years harvest was less bountiful than normal, with granaries, flour mills and bakeries practically empty. How will the people feed themselves this year?

choices.text: Who could have cursed this land with famine?

name: Desertion
text: Some of our troops have grown weary because of this war. Many of them are deserting their ranks and running away, making it difficult for our attacks to succeed.

choices.text: There is nothing we can do. Tell our generals to just bear this burden for now.
Increase their pay! A man will walk to Hell and back as long as they are given enough gold.
Put the deserters on trial and court-martial them. There is no space for conscientious objectors in our army!
Execute any deserters. We need to set an example to stop our troops leaving the front.

name: Olympiad
text: The International Olympics Committee have decided that we should host the next Olympic Games! How should we plan for this event?

choices.text: Prepare the Capital for the Games. It is the most suitable venue for the event.
Prepare the entire nation for the Games. This way will show the world the glory of our empire!
uniques: [+5 Gold] [in all cities] <in cities with a [Stadium]> <for [5] turns>

choices.text: We shall only accept this offer if we are able to deny our enemies from participating. We need to beat them on the front, and on the field!
uniques: Only available <when at war> <hidden from users>

name: Economic Depression
text: A rapid turn of events have lead to the collapse of our nation's economy, and the Stock Market falling to levels unseen before. Former barons and lords of business are finding their money losing their value rapidly, and the workers and nearly workers are now in crippling poverty. The next few years shall be remembered as an economic torment for the rest of history!

choices.text: Damn.

name: Economic Boom
text: Crowd gather around the stock markets as the economy starts to boom. Businesses are rapidly growing in size, and their worker's standard of living has never been better. The next few years shall be known as an economic paradise for the rest of history!

choices.text: Great!

name: Research
text: Some of our top scientists have rapidly increased our understanding on how the world works. How shall our nation support these researchers?

choices.text: Use their research to support our current military effort
uniques: [+25]% Production when constructing [Military] units [in all cities] <for [10] turns>
Only available <when at war> <hidden from users>

choices.text: Knowledge is of no use if it is not passed on.
uniques: [+3 Culture, +3 Science] from all [Science] buildings <for [10] turns>

choices.text: Support the Academia, and fund their research.

name: Asteroid
text: Worrying news has come from our top astronomers. It appears that an asteroid is expected to hit our planet, directly in our nation! Peaople are anxious, and many are losing hope, believing this is the beginning of Doomsday. What shall we do?

choices.text: We shall prevent that asteroid from hitting Earth, no matter the cost! Our nation shall be the saviour of this planet!
uniques: Only available <when number of [[Nuclear Missile] Units] is more than [0]> <hidden from users>

choices.text: Evacuate all civilians immediately! We can't stop the asteroid, we can prevevnt the devestation it will cause.
uniques: [+5 Happiness] <in cities with a [Bomb Shelter]> <for [10] turns>
[-5 Happiness] <in cities without a [Bomb Shelter]> <for [10] turns>

choices.text: Screw the people, grap all my top advisors and GET ME OUT OF HERE!

name: Obstacle
text: For years now, the grand building that has been serving as the seat of power of our nation has fallen into disrepair. Cracks and mould crawl out of far corners of walls, doors are unable to be closed as their hinges wear away, the beautiful art that line corridors and rooms have been smotherd in inch-thich layers of dust and grime. This building is no longer deemed fit for its purpose, and action needs to be taken immediately. What shall we do?

choices.text: We shall build a new building for our government! There may already be people and property present where the building site needs to be... but surely a bit of 'convincing' shall remove them from the area.
The embarassment of having such a beautiful piece of architecture being tarnished from decades of neglct shall not carry on! We shall renovate it immediately!
uniques: [+5 Production, +5 Culture, +2 Science, +1 Faith] from every [Palace]  <for [9999] turns>

name: The United States of America UE
text: Mr President, there has been recent discontent across our nation. Our people are at odds with each other, with one group advocating for the expansion of the use of slaves in order to revitalize the economy, while another is promoting the idea of 'Manifest Destiny' and the expansion of our nation to the uncivilized wilderness so that it can secure all the potential resources it needs. If one side does not triumph over another soon, our nation will descent into Civil War. What shall we do, Mr President?

choices.text: By expanding into the frontiers and bringing civilisation to these untamed lands, the United States shall secure its position in this world. Forwards to our Destiny!
uniques: [-80]% Culture cost of natural border growth [in all cities] <for [40] turns>

choices.text: Expanding the slave markets will allow us to have access to more cheap labour, allowing us to develop more quickly and efficiently. For industry and progress!

Both sides ignore the fact that the very existence of this nation is to protect the freedoms of all. We shall not do any of the barbaric practices these groups propose, even if it will cause a Civil War. Liberty for all, no mattter the cost!
uniques: All newly-trained [Land] units [in all cities] receive the [We The People] promotion <for [99999] turns> <hidden from users>
[Land] units gain the [We The People] promotion

name: Arabia UE
text: O Great Caliph, from the arid deserts, our people have forged a grand civilisation. Now it is time to decide what path our glorious nation should take. How shall our Caliphate and the Arab people be remembered for the rest of time?

choices.text: It is time for our grand conquest! The world shall look at our conquests in awe, and we shall be remembered indefinitely!
We should be known for our great contributions to science and philosophy. Our scholars and ulama shall be world-renowned masters of knowledge!
uniques: [+4 Science, +5 Faith] from all [Science] buildings  <for [9999] turns> <hidden from users>

choices.text: Our trade routes have made our people some of the wealthiest in the world. The wonder of our riches should be what we are known for!
uniques: Gain a free [Bazaar] [in this city] <upon founding a city>

name: Aztecs UE
text: Great Emperor of Tenochtitlan, our sacrifices to the Gods have allowed us to prosper and rise above other nations, but the high preists are concerened about our future. They have observed worrying patterns in the stars, pointing to our nation's demise. What shall we do to prevent these disasters from happening?

choices.text: The Gods are testing us so that they know that we are worthy of life. We shall devote more sacrifices to them. The blood from the temples shall not stop flowing!
uniques: Earn [1]% of killed [Military] unit's [Strength] as [Faith] <for [1000] turns> <hidden from users>
Comment [Earn 200% of killed Military unit's Strength as [Faith]]

choices.text: Our cities are slowly being engulfed in waste and filth. Take some of the sacrificial captives and make them clean the streets.
People on the borders of our empire are starting to not pay tribute to their preists and are showing signs of rebellion. Increase the power of the Tlatoani and the landowners to ensure stability!
uniques: [+10 Gold] from [Plantation] tiles [in all cities] <for [50] turns>

name: Babylon UE
text: O Great Lawgiver, King of All Four Corners of the Totality, the night sky has been filled with crimson flame and streams of smoke. The great priests have claimed that our creator-god, Marduk, is waging a war against Tiamat, the mother of all Gods. How shall our empire respond to this heavenly conflict?

choices.text: This is a blessing from Marduk! Our creator shall protect us from the envious and vile forces of Tiamat, and Babylon shall be his loyal servant
uniques: [+2 Food, +2 Science] from all [Faith] buildings <for [20] turns>

choices.text: Marduk is sending us a warning, showing that if we depart from the Gods, we shall suffer the same fate as his enemies. We shall build a Celestial Gate to show that we remain loyal to Marduk!
Get all the wise men in Babylon to observe this holy battle, quick! This war will only happen once, and we shall not have the chance to observe it in a later age.
uniques: Gain a free [Observatory] [in this city] <upon founding a city>

name: Byzantium UE
text: Noble Empress of the Romans, I have worrying news to tell you. Once again the Patriarchy of Constantinople seek to unseat you from your rightful throne, for they refuse to be led by a woman. What plans do you suspect they are carrying ou to depose your rightous rule?

choices.text: They must be planning to stage a coup with the army, meaning we cannot trust even or own troops. Hire some mercenaries, so that we have soldiers that are not under the thumb of the Patriarchy!

Support of the Church is vital for the Patriarch to exist. If we help the Church deal with its current isues with iconoclasm, we might sway them to our side and deny the Patriachy any legitimate support.
Only the external threats to Byzantium keep the Patriarchy in power. By destroying our foreign enemies, we would be able to cripple the Patriarchy!

name: China UE
text: Great Empress of the Middle Kingdom, a messenger awits outside the palace. They say that their message is of great importance. Oh look, here he is right now!

choices.text: Isn't that the son of my rival?... You Fool! This is an assassin, not a messenger! Guards! Guards!
A tea merchant? An offer to establish a tea pavilion in the capital in exchange for some patronage. My, why would I reject such an offer!
uniques: [+3 Culture, +2 Happiness] from all [Opera House] buildings <for [1000] turns>

choices.text: An envoy? There is news of a rediscovered religious text after an excavation of an old palace? This text could change the way we see the world forever!
uniques: [+2 Food, +2 Culture] from every [Holy site] <for [1000] turns>
[+2 Food, +2 Faith] from all [Culture] buildings <for [20] turns>

name: Denmark UE
text: High Thane, may Odin bless your soul! A horde of men have gathered outside the Palace, drunk of fire and anger. What shall be done to quell this rabble?

choices.text: They are angry due to the lack of housing in the winter. What good will happen if we let our people freeze? Open up the barracks so that these men have a place to rest!
uniques: [+2 Food, +2 Culture] from all [Barracks] buildings  <for [1000] turns>

choices.text: They are angry because of the lack of faith in our empire. Maybe we shouldn't have pillaged all those monestaries... No worry! We shall build our own churches!
uniques: Gain a free [Stave Church] [in all cities] <upon founding a city>

choices.text: They are angry as our coast have been left unprotected. Even the most pathetic cities can bolster a navy greater than ours! This shall not be the case, as the seas belong to the Danes!

name: Egypt UE
text: Great Pharaoh, the orphan that your wife has been raising has matured to an age where people have noticed his intelligence and ingenious ways. How will you direct this orphan so that his gifts benefit us?

choices.text: Fate should be left to Ra and Horus, not the pharaoh. The boy shall be whoever he wants.
He shall guide our engineers to construct machines accross our rivers, so that we can predict their flooding.
uniques: [+2 Production] from [Flood plains] tiles [in all cities] <for [20] turns>
[+1 Food] from [Flood plains] tiles [in all cities] <for [1000] turns>

choices.text: He shall help me purge the old, idiosyncratic ways of the nobility and start a lineage of fresh leaders. Now Egypt shall not fall behind its enemies!

name: England UE
text: Your majesty, our lords have been showing concerns about the stability of the Crown. Infighting in the Privy council, distrust in the Church of England and there being no official heir to the throne are becoming ever increasing issues. Luckily, one man has over the years grown in popularity and power, and we can lererage that to stabilise the nation. What shall we do, my queen?

choices.text: We can claim that he has found the legendary Excalibur! That will surely unite the people, knowing that the successor of the mythical King Arthur is with us.
We need to keep the church united and free from external influence. Make him the new Archbishop of Canterbury, and let him restore the faith in our empire!
uniques: [+50]% resources gifted by City-States <in cities following our religion> <for [1000] turns>

choices.text: The fringes of our empire may be susceptible to rebellion and distrust. This will hamper our imperial ambitions. Let this man be our colonial governor, so that the sun shall never set on the empire.

text: In this world plagued by division, we allow things like race and creed to set us apart. But God does not see the color of our skin, only the goodness of our soul. We will write it in our songs, in our tales, in our laws.

When they came to hear the Lord, they were called away to eat. But instead, he told them, stay, and fed them with manna from Heaven. How can we come closer to the Lord when our thoughts are shackled to the necessities of Earth. I will see that no man wants for bread, but no man can live by bread alone...

name: France UE
text: Glorious Emperor of France, I have some worrying news to tell you. It seems that some of the most recent laws the Republic has passed has not been recieved well by the people. Some rumours have been passed around that there might be a revolt if the laws are not reversed. How shall the Republic act, great Consul?

choices.text: The support of the intelligensia has waned because salon culture has declined. If I partake in this activity, it may revitalise it, and bring the brains of the nation back to being loyal.

French culture has been inhibited be th Academei of Paris, trying to moderate and standardise every pathetic thing, crushing the will of the people under its hobnailed boot. The arts shall be left free of control, for the people and by the people!
uniques: Comment [ +5 Culture from every National Wonder ]
[+5 Culture] from every [National Wonder] <for [9999] turns> <hidden from users>

choices.text: Bah! Can the people not see that I am a master leader!? If those ungratful brutes believe they deserve anything more than they already got, then I'll make them grateful!

name: Germany UE
text: Chancellor, the governors of all of our provnices has arrived at the Bundesrat to discuss solutions to solve rising issues in our nation. Old rivalries have flared up and even the greatest compronise cannot suppress these fueds. The german people need your power to restore order.

choices.text: These divisions between the pagans and the church have left our enemies an opportunity to see our weaknesses. We must unite ourselves under one banner, and forge a new people to dominate this world
uniques: All newly-trained [Land] units [in all cities] receive the [Woodsman] promotion <for [1000] turns>

choices.text: Crusaders and hires knights are constantly being hired by dukes and barons, forming paramilitaries that threaten our stability. We must merge them into one order, for the betterment of the people.

German trade has fallen dramatically, causing our craftsmen and merchants to become penniless. We shall form the Hanseatic League to improve trade relations and stop us from entering an economic disaster.

name: India UE
text: Namaste, great leader. If it does not bother you, your council of Lords wish you to share some of your wisdom. They believe that it will greatly benefit their work and help them address some of the issues that we have recently been having.

choices.text: Faith is nessecary for men to do great things. My lords shall need to lean closer to heaven, and only then shall they reap the rewards for their actions.
uniques: Gain a free [Temple] [in this city] <upon founding a city>

choices.text: We need to protect ourselves from outside threats. Our enemies will spare no expense to drestroy our nation, so we shall do everything in our power to prevent it!

The people in the lands we have recently expanded into have complained about how they are treated under the caste system. We must abolish this backwards system, even if it might anger the lords of the nation

name: Japan UE
text: Great Shogun! Your presence is needed at the Chrysanthemum Throne. The Emperor urgently requires you to be there.

choices.text: The Emperor is displeased with his court musicians. For commiting the crime of displeasing the emperor, we shall have them and their families killed!
Foriegn nations look down upon Japan, calling us barbaric, and the Emperor knows this. We shall not worry however, as our ingenuity will pull Japan into the ranks of elite nations.
Our coasts are weak and undefended. The Emperor worries that our foes might exploit this weakness. Therefore we will build new defences so that the Emperor can sleep easy at night.

name: Korea UE
text: Great King, all your advisors and scholars of the Jade Hall have arrived to discuss the matters of your kingdom. What shall we set out to do in the next years of your reign?

choices.text: There has been tension between the peasantry, wanting to learn and become scholars, and the educated elite, who want to limit others from grasping at their power. In order to settle this, we shall reform the alphabet, so that the peasants shall easily rise to the wisest ranks of Korean society!
uniques: [+1 Science] from [Farm] tiles [in all cities] <for [9999] turns>

choices.text: There has been tension between the peasantry, wanting to learn and become scholars, and the educated elite, who want to limit others from grasping at their power. Therefore, we shall limit the levels of social mobility in our nation, so that the elite scholars hall not be tainted by the peasantry!
uniques: [+2 Culture, +1 Production] from every specialist [in all cities] <for [9999] turns>

choices.text: There has been tension between the peasantry, wanting to learn and become scholars, and the educated elite, who want to limit others from grasping at their power. So, in order to prevent any conflict, I shall ignore this problem alltogether and order the construction of Gyeongbok Palace!
uniques: Comment [The peasantry and the nobles become very confused.]

name: Mongolia UE
text: Chinggis Khan! The latest rounds of captives have been brought to you. What would you like to do with them? I'll get you a cushion to rest your legs on, this will take a while.

choices.text: These men are all carers of silkworms, living peaceful lives and selling silk to merchants, and now they can continue! Their fine silk shall give our Orda many riches.
Tea farmers? Hmm... let these men carry on growing their crops; there are many city-dwellers that would kill for this plant!
uniques: [+2 Culture] from each Trade Route <for [9999] turns>

choices.text: Men of their Gods? They beg to give mercy to their followers souls, so I shall. It is the wise and the holy of all religions that keeps our Orda strong.
uniques: [+2 Gold, +2 Production] from all [Faith] buildings <for [9999] turns>

name: Rome UE
text: Imperator! Unfortunate news has come from the Senate of Rome. One of their consuls have suddenly died recently, and a successor needs to be apointed soon. Can you give your guidence to the Senate?

choices.text: Appoint the consul whose father was a Merchant. The skills that their Father has passed onto them shall surely bring large benefits to the Empire.
uniques: [+1 Culture, +1 Food, +1 Science] from all [Market] buildings <for [9999] turns>
[+2 Gold] from [Farm] tiles [in all cities] <for [10] turns>

choices.text: Appoint the Architect. I have inherited this empire from Ceaser, and turned it Rome into a city of Marble. It takes a man of engineering and art to ensure Rome keeps on standing.
uniques: Gain a free [Aqueduct] [in this city] <upon founding a city>
[+3 Food, +2 Science] from all [Granary] buildings <for [10] turns>

choices.text: Appoint the General. Only through combar and war is Rome's might tested, and only a Legatus will guarantee victory to our Legions.
uniques: [-75]% Culture cost of natural border growth [in all cities] <for [10] turns>

name: Russia UE
text: Tsarina! Your advisors have all arived at the Winter Palace for our annual secretmeeting. What matters do you want to discuss, your Imperial Majesty?

choices.text: I want to hasten the assimilation of the people of the far-flung borders of my empire. They rest on land too valuble to pass up, and getting them into our hands is a priority.
uniques: [+1 Food, +1 Culture] from [Tundra] tiles [in all cities] <for [9999] turns>

choices.text: The serfs and the workers have been a bit too rebelious recently. I intend my advisors draft up a revised governing scheme for the nation, in order to quell any dissent.
uniques: [+1 Gold] from [Farm] tiles [in all cities] <for [9999] turns>

choices.text: Conscription of more men into the army is needed if this empire wishes to remain. Send out the dafts and open the conscription centres!

name: Spain UE
text: Your majesty? I deeply apologise for interupting your prayer, but your advisors wish for you to be in their presence. They want to discuss some urgent matters with you.

choices.text: What's this? Rumours about a recently decesed student being suddenly ressurected!? I wish for this boy to be summoned to me right now! This is a miracle of the Lord!
uniques: [+2 Faith] from every specialist [in all cities] <for [10] turns>

choices.text: My advisors are concerened about our godless neighbours encroaching on our holy land? An understandable concern..., but no worry! If they refuse to see the light of God, then we shall bring it to them!
Riches beyond belief have been reported outside our borders? The discovery of these riches shall be our upmost prority, for it will be the righteous children of God who shall marvel these wonders!
uniques: [+100]% Production when constructing [Settler] units [in all cities] <for [9999] turns>
[+100]% Production when constructing [Conquistador] units [in all cities] <for [9999] turns>
